policy: Learning OS uses real lesson, question, learner, capstone, teacher and audit evidence only. Missing inputs stay unknown/unavailable.

checks.label: Diagnostic intake covers exam domains, graph scoring, placement, first-week plan, latency, why-path, retake and export
checks.detail: Diagnostic rows are built from existing lesson concepts and question ids only.

checks.label: Daily missions cover SRS, weak concepts, capstones, exam, time boxes, balance, recovery, forecast, agreement and EOD summary
checks.detail: Plans do not pad missions when evidence is missing.

checks.label: Project Studio covers milestone tracking, submission metadata, rubric, anti-pattern notes, README, review notes, health score and deterministic templates
checks.detail: Project output is derived from capstone data and local progress only.

checks.label: Teacher/cohort pilot uses class setup, cohort heatmap, assignment recipes, risk alerts, weekly exports and support SOP
checks.detail: Teacher reports use real class/evidence rows and unknown/unavailable for gaps.

checks.label: AI Tutor production guardrails cover proxy, rate limits, coach mode, context, misconceptions, logs, eval and fallback
checks.detail: AI Tutor remains credential-gated and does not leak direct answers.

checks.label: Accessibility/mobile/trust covers WCAG, keyboard journey, reduced-load modes, mobile touch, offline conflict, performance, privacy and trust
checks.detail: Trust surfaces are contracts and gates; missing evidence stays unknown/unavailable.

checks.label: Learning OS report scripts are wired
